title: Paytm Money is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Paytm Money is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money:
Paytm Money is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
